checkedConditions: Anthropic emits a StatusDetail during provider rate-limit cooldown waits.
OpenRouter emits a StatusDetail during provider rate-limit cooldown waits.
Provider wait durations use a shared compact formatter so cooldown/backpressure details are consistent.
Focused tests, cargo check, selfdev build/reload, governance, commit and push pass.
notes: Anthropic and OpenRouter now emit StatusDetail entries for rate-limit cooldown waits before sleeping. Backpressure StatusDetail formatting for Anthropic/OpenRouter also uses the same shared compact formatter that OpenAI now delegates to.
